values: monochrome pencil illustration, fine hatching, 19th century engraving style
ink drawing with obsessive crosshatching, antique illustration texture
woodcut print style, rough carved linework, stark black and white contrast
transparent watercolor wash, diluted ink bleeds, ghostly paper grain
ukiyo-e inspired line rhythm, dramatic wave forms, aged print texture
museum specimen plate style, scientific diagram aesthetics, archival ink

monster_bases.description: 怪物の核となるモチーフ
values: eldritch cephalopod colossus
spider and abyssal fish hybrid titan
plant-insect oracle with root-like tendrils
winged invertebrate mass with gelatinous flesh
sentient coral cathedral organism
colossal brain-eye biomass entity
asymmetric clusters of eyes and bioluminescent nodules
skeletal limbs fused with soft tentacular tissue
moss-covered carapace growing tumor-like ridges
coral branches replacing vertebrae and ribs
human cranial fragments embedded in chitinous growth
feather-like membranes coated in viscous slime

anatomical_anomalies.description: 解剖学的に不可能な特徴
values: its boundaries dissolve into surrounding darkness
its body loops in non-euclidean folds
its silhouette never settles into a fixed anatomy
its internal organs are visible yet spatially impossible
its limbs emerge and retract from impossible angles
its surface shifts between rock, flesh, and mist
a cosmic abyss that feels both deep ocean and outer space
a ruined cathedral ceiling opening into a starless void
a collapsing library of forbidden astronomy manuscripts
hydrothermal vents in the black deep sea trench
an abandoned megacity swallowed by nebula-like fog
a desert horizon splitting open into an eldritch breach
a dream-geometry corridor with impossible perspective
a ritual chamber carved beneath cyclopean ruins

atmosphere_particles.description: 粒子・霧・渦などの空気感
values: swirling ash-like particles and cold mist strands
nebular dust spirals and wet abyssal haze
smoke vortices that mimic tidal currents
faint drifting spores with static-like glitter
submerged sediment clouds and distant phosphorescence
fog layers that bend around unseen gravity
an unclear light source glows from nowhere
backlit haze reveals only fragmented contours
dim rim light catches the wet edges of tendrils
flickering ritual light and cosmic underglow
monochrome chiaroscuro with deep engraved shadows
bioluminescent highlights piercing vast darkness
low human viewpoint emphasizing impossible scale difference
top-down surveillance angle, as if the viewer is being watched
cross-sectional composition showing internal impossible geometry
spiral composition pulling the gaze into the center abyss
distant silhouette composition with tiny foreground witnesses
multi-entity swarm composition around one central deity-form
depicted as a forbidden page from an old sailor's logbook
presented as a scientist's field observation report
captured at the climax of an unfinished summoning ritual
rendered as an archaeological mural in ruined stone
shown as evidence recovered from a lost expedition
framed like a museum archive annotation with specimen numbering
weathered occult sigils carved into surrounding surfaces
fragmented astronomical diagrams and impossible star charts
latin annotation fragments and specimen labels
eroded ritual circles stained with mineral residue
half-erased expedition notes in the margins
repeating eye motifs hidden in architecture
strict monochrome black and silver graphite tones
deep sea blue and bioluminescent green accents
muted sepia archive tone with cold black shadows
ashen grayscale with subtle toxic cyan glow
ink-black base with pale phosphor highlights
stormy indigo, algae green, and bone-white accents
overwhelming cosmic dread and sacred beauty
beautiful horror with ancient unknowable presence
quiet terror and metaphysical melancholy
oppressive awe mixed with reverent fascination
dreamlike unease and existential vertigo
cold documentary detachment over impossible terror
ultra-detailed linework with obsessive micro-texture
balanced detail with clear focal hierarchy
dense edge detail fading into atmospheric abstraction
high-frequency hatching and rough tactile grain
careful engraving detail with controlled negative space
layered material textures with anatomical intricacy
